pkgmetadata.longdescription: marshmallow3-annotationsThis is a fork of [marshmallow-annotations](httpsgithub.comjustanrmarshmallow-annotations) which has been minimallypatched to be marshmallow 3.0.0+ compatible. All credit goes to the original author.It is available on [PyPI](httpspypi.orgprojectmarshmallow3-annotations).
